sections.heading: Non-Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer — Low Risk
sections.content: {"pathway_id":"nmIBC_low_risk","title":"Non-Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer — Low Risk","branching_basis":["Tumor grade","Tumor stage","Tumor size","Tumor number (solitary vs multifocal)"],"nodes":[{"criteria":"PUNLMP or low-grade urothelial carcinoma: solitary Ta, ≤3 cm, no CIS","options":[{"type":"intravesical","label":"Immediate postoperative intravesical chemotherapy (gemcitabine preferred, mitomycin alternative)","preference":"category 1","recommendation":"Single instillation within 24 hours of TURBT","linked_regimen_ids":["immediate_gemcitabine","immediate_mitomycin"]},{"type":"surgical","label":"TURBT alone","preference":"preferred","recommendation":"No further treatment needed after complete resection"},{"type":"surveillance","label":"Active surveillance with cystoscopy","preference":"recommended","recommendation":"Cystoscopy at months 3 and 12, then annually for up to 5 years"}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":false,"summary":"No adjuvant intravesical therapy is required for low-risk NMIBC beyond immediate perioperative instillation."}}]}

sections.heading: Non-Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer — Intermediate Risk
sections.content: {"pathway_id":"nmIBC_intermediate_risk","title":"Non-Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer — Intermediate Risk","branching_basis":["Tumor grade","Tumor multifocality","Tumor size ≥3 cm","Early recurrence (<1 year)","Prior intravesical therapy failure"],"nodes":[{"criteria":"Intermediate risk defined by IBCG: Ta low-grade recurrent/multifocal/≥3 cm; any T1 low-grade; any Ta G2 regardless of recurrence","options":[{"type":"intravesical","label":"6-week induction course of intravesical BCG (preferred) or chemotherapy (gemcitabine, mitomycin, sequential gemcitabine/docetaxel)","preference":"BCG preferred, but BCG availability should be considered","recommendation":"Initiated 3-4 weeks after TURBT; maintenance BCG limited to 1 year for intermediate-risk","linked_regimen_ids":["bcg_induction","gemcitabine_induction","mitomycin_induction"]},{"type":"intravesical","label":"Reverse thermal hydrogel-based mitomycin (UGN-101) for intravesical solution","preference":"useful in certain circumstances","recommendation":"For recurrent, low-grade, intermediate-risk NMIBC who prefer to avoid surgery [footnote pp]"},{"type":"surveillance","label":"Surveillance without induction therapy","preference":"alternative option","recommendation":"Appropriate for select intermediate-risk patients; closer cystoscopic follow-up"}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":true,"summary":"After 6-week induction, maintenance BCG for 1 year is preferred for intermediate-risk. No additional benefit from 3 years of maintenance demonstrated in intermediate-risk patients [76]."}}]}

sections.heading: Non-Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer — High Risk, BCG-Naive
sections.content: {"pathway_id":"nmIBC_high_risk_bcg_naive","title":"Non-Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer — High Risk, BCG-Naive","branching_basis":["BCG exposure status","Presence of CIS","Very-high-risk features (BCG unresponsive, lymphovascular invasion, prostatic urethral invasion, subtype histology)"],"nodes":[{"criteria":"High-grade Ta/T1 and/or CIS without prior BCG exposure or >2 years since adequate BCG exposure; no very-high-risk features","options":[{"type":"intravesical","label":"BCG induction followed by maintenance therapy (category 1)","preference":"preferred","recommendation":"6-week induction followed by 3-week maintenance at months 3, 6, 12, 18, 24, 30, and 36; 3 years for high-risk","linked_regimen_ids":["bcg_induction_maintenance_swog"]},{"type":"intravesical","label":"BCG + Durvalumab","preference":"useful in certain circumstances","recommendation":"Based on POTOMAC trial; Panel decided not to include due to risk-benefit concerns [132]"},{"type":"intravesical","label":"Intravesical chemotherapy or clinical trial","preference":"other recommended","recommendation":"Gemcitabine, mitomycin, sequential gemcitabine/docetaxel"},{"type":"surgical","label":"Cystectomy","preference":"useful in certain circumstances","recommendation":"Consider when very-high-risk features are present (lymphovascular invasion, prostatic urethral involvement, aggressive subtypes)"}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":true,"summary":"BCG induction followed by maintenance (3 years for high-risk) is the preferred approach. Maintenance BCG is category 1 for BCG-naive high-risk NMIBC without very-high-risk features [130]."}},{"criteria":"BCG-exposed high-risk NMIBC: high-grade Ta/CIS ≥3 months after BCG induction only (BCG resistant); high-grade recurrence ≥12 months after adequate BCG (late relapse); or high-grade recurrence <24 months after inadequate BCG","options":[{"type":"intravesical","label":"Repeat BCG induction (particularly if initial course inadequate)","preference":"preferred","recommendation":"Consider repeat induction if initial course was not completed"},{"type":"intravesical","label":"Intravesical multi-agent or single-agent chemotherapy; clinical trial","preference":"other recommended","recommendation":"Sequentia"}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":true,"summary":""}}]}

nodes.label: PUNLMP or low-grade urothelial carcinoma: solitary Ta, ≤3 cm, no CIS
Immediate postoperative intravesical chemotherapy (gemcitabine preferred, mitomycin alternative)

edges.label: Single instillation within 24 hours of TURBT
No further treatment needed after complete resection
Cystoscopy at months 3 and 12, then annually for up to 5 years

nodes.label: Intermediate risk defined by IBCG: Ta low-grade recurrent/multifocal/≥3 cm; any T1 low-grade; any Ta G2 regardless of recurrence
6-week induction course of intravesical BCG (preferred) or chemotherapy (gemcitabine, mitomycin, sequential gemcitabine/docetaxel)
Reverse thermal hydrogel-based mitomycin (UGN-101) for intravesical solution

edges.label: Initiated 3-4 weeks after TURBT; maintenance BCG limited to 1 year for intermediate-risk
For recurrent, low-grade, intermediate-risk NMIBC who prefer to avoid surgery [footnote pp]
Appropriate for select intermediate-risk patients; closer cystoscopic follow-up

flowcharts.title: Non-Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer — High Risk, BCG-Naive

nodes.label: High-grade Ta/T1 and/or CIS without prior BCG exposure or >2 years since adequate BCG exposure; no very-high-risk features
BCG induction followed by maintenance therapy (category 1)

BCG-exposed high-risk NMIBC: high-grade Ta/CIS ≥3 months after BCG induction only (BCG resistant); high-grade recurrence ≥12 months after adequate BCG (late relapse); or high-grade recurrence <24 months after inadequate BCG
Repeat BCG induction (particularly if initial course inadequate)
Intravesical multi-agent or single-agent chemotherapy; clinical trial

edges.label: 6-week induction followed by 3-week maintenance at months 3, 6, 12, 18, 24, 30, and 36; 3 years for high-risk
Based on POTOMAC trial; Panel decided not to include due to risk-benefit concerns [132]
Consider when very-high-risk features are present (lymphovascular invasion, prostatic urethral involvement, aggressive subtypes)
Consider repeat induction if initial course was not completed
